decisions.briefing: Markets were essentially flat today with both the S&P 500 (+0.2%) and NASDAQ (+0.1%) showing no meaningful conviction in either direction. With only $444.94 in cash — below the $500 threshold that triggers a strong preference to fill open slots — no new positions were opened. All six current holdings remain within normal ranges with no stop-loss or profit-target triggers firing.

market_education.summary_en: U.S. equities drifted marginally higher in a low-conviction session, with the S&P 500 gaining 0.2% and the NASDAQ adding just 0.1%. Investors appeared to be in a holding pattern amid lingering trade policy uncertainty and a quiet corporate news cycle, producing narrow breadth and light volume. The session offered no strong catalyst to shift positioning in either direction.
market_education.summary_zh: 美國股市週一小幅收高，標普500指數漲0.2%，納斯達克指數微升0.1%，全日走勢缺乏明確方向。在貿易政策不確定性持續及企業消息面平靜的背景下，市場投資者普遍維持觀望態度，成交量清淡、市場廣度收窄，呈現典型低信心盤整格局，未見明確觸發買賣的催化劑。

daily_lesson.explanation_en: Cash drag is the performance penalty that comes from holding uninvested cash in a portfolio. While cash provides flexibility and a safety buffer, it earns near-zero returns and causes the portfolio to underperform when markets rise. Today illustrates this tension — we have 4 open slots but insufficient cash to deploy meaningfully, so we accept a small drag rather than force a position.
daily_lesson.explanation_zh: 「現金拖累」是指投資組合中保留未投資現金所造成的績效損耗。現金雖可提供靈活性與安全緩衝，但幾乎不產生回報，市場上漲時會導致組合表現落後大市。今日情況正好體現這種兩難——組合尚有4個空缺倉位，但可用現金不足以有效建倉，因此選擇接受小幅現金拖累，而非勉強進場。
